summary: Full frontend verification of Korean HanjaPath Expo app on 390x844 mobile viewport. All 9 screens (Home, Character, Practice, Saved, Studied, Search, Daily, Quiz, Activity) render correctly. All 12 feature requirements from the review request validated. 1,301 characters loaded from bundled JSON; all 9 levels (8급→3급 including 준5급/준4급/준3급) open without crashing and display the polished character card layout.

issues: When reviewCharacters is empty on first load, the Review step auto-marks as 'Reviewed' (1 of 3 steps complete). Button label 'Reviewed' could be clearer as 'No reviews today' so users don't think they already did work they didn't.
Stat card '0 Day Streak' shows singular 'Day' regardless of count; minor pluralization polish (e.g. 'Days').

react_native_issues.issue: On web preview, WebView shows 'React Native WebView does not support this platform.' placeholder text. Per review note this is expected (HanziWriter only animates on native). The surrounding card UI, grid, practice toolbar, counter, controls all render correctly around the placeholder.

action_items: (Optional, nice-to-have) Add testID props to all interactive elements (TouchableOpacity/Pressable/TextInput) for more robust automation. Currently all testing relies on text selectors, which worked but is fragile if labels change.
(Optional) Replace 'Reviewed' button label with 'No reviews today' when reviewCharacters.length === 0 — prevents confusion about auto-completion on first-load.
(Optional) Pluralize 'Day Streak' label (0/1 Day vs 2 Days).
Deprecation warnings in expo.err.log: "shadow*" style props deprecated (use boxShadow); props.pointerEvents deprecated (use style.pointerEvents). Does not block runtime but worth migrating.
critical_code_review_comments: character.js is ~560 lines including inline HanziWriter HTML/CSS/JS — could be extracted to a separate helper to keep the screen file <400 lines.

index.js LEVELS array hardcodes counts (30/20/20/81/150/200/200/300/300). Verified against global_characters.json and all 9 counts match exactly (1,301 total). Consider deriving counts dynamically to prevent future drift.

Tight coupling: 4 separate AsyncStorage keys for savedCharacters / studiedCharacters / dailyPathPlan / dailyPathLearnedCharacters. All work correctly but consider a single namespaced store for easier migrations.
activity.js utility is clean and idempotent per-day (streak only bumps when lastDay !== today).
No testID attributes anywhere in /app/frontend/app — breaks the project-wide guideline. All testing done via text/role selectors.
Minor: index.js loadSaved (useEffect on mount) is redundant with loadStats in useFocusEffect; saved state is also unused (setSaved) in render — dead code.
search.js scoring function is well-structured with a tiered scoring system; exact English-gloss match short-circuits correctly (e.g. 'nine' → 九 only).
seed_data_creation: None. Bundled data: 1,301 chars across 9 levels + 295 words.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Expo-router file-based app with 9 screens. Viewport 390x844. Preview: https://korean-char-learn.preview.emergentagent.com. No backend, no mocked APIs. All state in AsyncStorage (web polyfill). HanziWriter WebView shows 'not supported' placeholder on web — expected; only works on native. No testIDs — use text selectors. All 9 levels verified to load /character?level=X without crash. Search verified for English ('nine'), hanja ('九'), Korean ('학' → mixed char + word '단어' results). Quiz verified to render question with 4 options. Daily Path verified to auto-build plan with 5 new chars from 8급.
rca_of_issue: No bugs identified. All review_request features (Home widgets, stat card nav, 9-level open, polished character card, Practice screen, save toggle, related words section, level counts, Search, Saved/Studied empty+populated, Daily Path 3-step plan, Quiz 3 question types, Activity streak/longest/week-dots/today-grid/recent-days, and persistence via AsyncStorage) rendered correctly on mobile web preview.
